description_long: This is a rectangular marble monument with a broad, flat face featuring a large reddish-brown plaque mounted centrally on the front. The plaque displays a raised relief of a person on horseback, surrounded by an inscription, and is bordered by a simple frame. The monument is constructed from white marble with subtle gray veining, giving it a stately and durable appearance. The base is wider than the main shaft, with a slightly beveled edge and patches of green moss or grass at the bottom, suggesting outdoor placement. The back and sides are plain, with no visible ornamentation or inscriptions. The overall design is solemn and commemorative, suitable for marking a historical site or honoring an individual.
description: A white marble monument with a reddish-brown commemorative plaque on the front, set on a broad base with moss at the bottom. The sides and back are plain and unadorned.
description_view_0: The front view shows the reddish-brown plaque with a relief and inscription, mounted on the white marble face and bordered by a broad, mossy base.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the monument's thickness and plain marble surface, with the plaque edge just visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely plain marble surface with no inscriptions or decorations, and the broad base is visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the monument's thickness and plain marble, with the plaque edge slightly visible.
attribute_inscription: There is a visible inscription on the reddish-brown plaque on the front face, written in English, with raised lettering. The text is partially legible and commemorative in style.
attribute_ornamentation: A raised relief of a person on horseback is present on the front plaque, surrounded by a laurel motif. No other ornamentation is visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular, wider than the main shaft, with a flat top and beveled edges. It is made of the same white marble and shows patches of green moss or grass at the bottom.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, matching the shaft, with no unique features or decorations.
attribute_surrounding_features: Patches of green moss or grass are visible at the base, suggesting outdoor placement. No other surrounding features are present.
